description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

On March 3 (Tuesday), Iruma野 Agricultural Cooperative donated items to support traffic safety activities and help prevent traffic accidents: 399 crossing flags (339 for children, 60 for parents) and 300 traffic safety umbrellas for children.

The traffic safety umbrellas have a transparent panel so children can see ahead clearly even while holding the umbrella.

We plan to use the crossing flags and traffic safety umbrellas donated this time to promote traffic safety and prevent traffic accidents at Hanno City elementary schools.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/shiseijoho/shichoshitsu/shichoblog/shisei2026/shisei202603/13213.html
summary: 📝 Mayor: Iruma野 Agricultural Cooperative Donates Crossing Flags and Traffic Safety Umbrellas
